items.title: Marina Herlop Readies New Album Dja Dja
items.summary: The Catalan composer and experimental musician will self-release her follow-up to 2023’s Nekkuja

items.title: Village People Singer Victor Willis Dies at 74
items.summary: Initially a backup singer, Willis became the group’s core, fronting the costumed band and co-writing “Y.M.C.A.,” “In the Navy,” and “Go West”
